{{CargoRelic
|name=Polar Snow Shovel
|class_id=20933
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=This exquisitely crafted and uniquely shaped snow shovel is a small gift specially customized by a reindeer for its companion who tried hard to help it find its gift. It not only has significant commemorative value but also symbolizes their friendship!
|fame=32
|art=16
|fth=14
|civ=14
|tech=14
|ss1=Free Gene Speedup (Mutant) +6m<br>Per 30 Fissure Floors, Snail DEF +1<br>Fissure Floor: 1200/1200
|ss2=Free Gene Speedup (Mutant) +12m<br>Per 30 Fissure Floors, Snail DEF +2<br>Fissure Floor: 1200/1200
|ss3=Free Gene Speedup (Mutant) +18m<br>Per 30 Fissure Floors, Snail DEF +3<br>Fissure Floor: 1200/1200
|ss4=Free Gene Speedup (Mutant) +18m<br>Per 30 Fissure Floors, Snail DEF +3<br>Fissure Floor: 1200/1200
|ss7=Free Gene Speedup (Mutant) +18m<br>Per 30 Fissure Floors, Snail DEF +3<br>Fissure Floor: 1200/1200<br> (Awakened)
}}
